description: Built React projects with CI/CD, unit tests and integration with a Java SpringBoot API and MySQL database. Implemented dynamic drag-and-drop forms, a design system with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. Focus on SEO, accessibility and reusable componentization following Clean Code and UI/UX practices.
Built Next.js apps with CI/CD integration, AWS and a Nest.js API. Multi-user donation validation via webhooks on a fundraising platform.

Teaching technical and qualification classes: Introduction to Computer Science, Programming Logic, Basic Frontend and React. Applied PBL, pedagogical planning, didactic material creation and student mentoring for the job market.
Delivered small projects focused on frontend web development. Supported day-to-day operations of innovation projects.
